title: Eschweilera acuminata
taxonomy: Eschweilera acuminata is a species of flowering plant in the family Lecythidaceae. It is a member of the genus Eschweilera, which is part of the order Ericales. The plant is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. Within the family Lecythidaceae, Eschweilera acuminata is classified along with other similar species such as Eschweilera coriacea and Eschweilera ovatifolia. These classifications are based on the plant's morphology, anatomy, and genetic characteristics.
